The '''11P power generator''' was a power generator created by [[Lotek]].

==Characteristics==
It was installed on the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[HT-2200 medium freighter]], however its power output was considered just barely enough to power the standard model's twin [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]] [["Queldor" single-barrel laser cannon]]s.
